signal_text: The thing nobody tells you about shipping Claude in production is that the eval debt accrues silently for 6 weeks, then surfaces all at once. Spent today wiring a regression harness across our agent suite. Worth it.
Excited to share I've joined Example Fashion as Head of RevOps. Previously at a marketplace unicorn where I rebuilt the lead-to-opportunity pipeline. Looking forward to bringing that playbook here.
Today we launched v3 with AI features built on Claude. We've spent 4 months on the eval and guardrail layer — most of the work was making it boring and predictable for our enterprise customers.
We are proud to receive the Industry Excellence Award for the 5th consecutive year.

Open role: Marketing Engineering Lead, Agentic Systems. Looking for a builder who has shipped Claude-based systems in production with HubSpot/Salesforce integration, eval frameworks, and the willingness to be the most technical person in a marketing room.
ExampleBPM announces expanded UK utilities BPM contract with major energy retailer to support customer experience transformation.
Example Fintech closes $80M Series C led by global VC. Plans to expand sales team 3x over next 12 months.
Happy 25th work anniversary to our beloved Vice Chairman!
